title: epidendrum × rubroticum
intro: Epidendrum × rubroticum, also known as the Red Banded Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species created by crossing two different species of Epidendrum orchids. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Epidendrum × rubroticum include its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial properties which can help prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant's extracts have been used to prepare herbal remedies, including tinctures and infusions, which are applied topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
